meta.title: AI Dev 25 NYC: Event Highlights
meta.description:
What a day! AI Dev 25 x NYC, hosted by Andrew Ng and DeepLearning.AI, brought together engineers, researchers, and builders to share what they’re learning as they design and deploy AI systems in the real world. 

This highlight reel captures moments from the talks, demos, hallway conversations, and hands-on sessions across the day.

From agent architectures and context engineering to governance, optimization, and production workflows, the event showcased how developers are approaching AI in practice.

Watch the recap to revisit the ideas that shaped the day.

See you at AI Dev 26 in San Francisco!

Early bird tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
